blockingIssues.description: Day-of reminder email omits event date in both HTML and plain-text bodies, conflicting with feature requirements for full details in both templates.

appliedUpdates.description: Added command aliases for `test` and `lint` so scrutiny validators are explicitly represented in shared services metadata.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add mission authoring guidance to keep `features.json` and `validation-contract.md` assertion details in sync, and explicitly define precedence when they conflict.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: email-template-redesign review found conflicting requirements for day-of reminder date inclusion between features.json and validation-contract.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Disallow validator commands piped through truncation tools (e.g., `| tail`) unless `set -o pipefail` is enforced, to avoid masked non-zero exits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: poster-interaction-redesign transcript used `pnpm build 2>&1 | tail -20`, which can report success despite upstream command failure.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a non-visual validation path for config/lint-only features and relax tests-first wording for cross-file formatting-only updates where test harness additions are unnecessary.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: timezone-fix and fix-preexisting-lint-errors completed correctly without added tests or browser checks despite current skill language implying those are mandatory.

rejectedObservations.reason: deferred to orchestrator due instruction boundary against documentation updates in this run

rejectedObservations.observation: Treat `src/pages/admin/events/[slug]/index.astro` timezone contract mention as a defect requiring immediate code change
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected as non-blocking review metadata mismatch; implementation behavior is already correct
